text:
to Family Members 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125G, HHA-230G 

Except as provided in §50.3, medical social services furnished solely to members of the 
patient's family and that are not incidental to covered medical social services being 
furnished to the patient are not covered. 

80.8 - Respiratory Care Services 
(Rev. 265, Issued: 01-10-20, Effective: 01-01-20, Implementation: 02-11-20)
